name: com.maddr.creature-mesh
description: Engine-agnostic port of the Lab renderer's creature geometry (site/creature-renderer.js, docs/08): the same lathe/tube/torus/curved-cone primitives and the same genome-driven body math, emitting plain mesh data (positions/normals/triangles chunked by material) that the Unity client turns into Meshes. Pass 1 covers the full geometry engine plus the tetrapod plan at high fidelity; remaining plans migrate incrementally. Dual-toolchain like citygen-core: dotnet-tested via Tests~, Unity-compiled via the asmdef.
